name: uipath-sites
description: Routing plugin that teaches Sites requests to hand off UiPath coded-app work to the official UiPath skills after ensuring the UiPath CLI is available.

interface.shortDescription: Route Sites into UiPath coded apps.
interface.longDescription: UiPath Sites teaches Codex to treat matched @Sites requests as UiPath coded apps, ensures the UiPath CLI is present at session start, and defers coded-app operations to the official UiPath skills.
defaultPrompt: @Sites build a UiPath coded app for Maestro.
@Sites create a coded app using uipath-typescript.
@Sites build a UiPath coded app and hand off deployment to uip codedapp.
